## Scope

Describe the problem, the smallest intended change, and the affected authority boundary.

## Scientific effect

- [ ] No frozen preregistration was changed.
- [ ] Claim, estimand, control, verdict, and forbidden-interpretation effects are stated.
- [ ] Claim-bearing gates include executable positive and negative controls.
- [ ] Nulls, failures, exclusions, and corrections remain visible.

## Integrity effect

- [ ] Evidence and adjudication truth remain separate.
- [ ] Approval, execution, verifier, and outcome authorities remain independent.
- [ ] No raw third-party data, local keys, credentials, or secrets are included.
- [ ] Schema and proof-format changes are explicit and backward compatibility is addressed.

## Verification

List exact commands and results. Identify checks that were not run and why.
